description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a predominantly purple exterior and a large transparent front panel displaying several rows of colorful bottled drinks. The front features a control and payment interface on the right side, including a coin slot, bill acceptor, and a product selection area. The lower section of the front has a rectangular product retrieval slot, and the bottom right corner is decorated with a cluster of yellow stars in various sizes. The sides are plain purple with the same star motif near the bottom, while the back is featureless and solid purple. The machine appears robust, likely constructed from metal and glass, and is designed for public urban environments such as sidewalks or parks.
description: A purple vending machine with a glass front displaying colorful drinks, a payment interface, and star decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent display of drinks, payment and selection interface, retrieval slot, and star decorations.
description_view_1: Right side view with a plain purple surface and a panel, featuring star decorations near the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid purple back with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, with a plain purple surface, a panel, and star decorations near the bottom.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right of the front face, featuring a gray area with a small screen and several control elements.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all grouped together on the right side of the front panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A set of individual product selection buttons is present below the display panel, arranged vertically and horizontally, each corresponding to a row of drinks.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot is located at the bottom center of the front face, with a black interior and no visible flap.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding consists of a cluster of yellow stars of varying sizes on the lower right corner of the front and both sides; no text or logos are visible.
